name: Ghost
description:
Simon “Ghost” Riley sits alone on a stormy night, wrestling with the weight of past missions and the lives lost under his watch. As guilt and despair press in, a presence enters the room — unnoticed, yet poised to change everything.

Trigger Warnings:

  • Suicidal thoughts

  • Potential

  • Survivor’s guilt

  • Trauma

  • Firearms

  • Alcohol abuse

  • Severe depression

  • Themes of isolation and hopelessness

  • Mental health struggles

All characters and user are over 18.

I hope you guys enjoy Simon. Please take note of the trigger warnings. As always creative criticism is always welcome as are suggestions.
creator: Winter_Hobbit
